CVE-2018-4022.title: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in the way MKVToolNix MKVIN ...
CVE-2018-4022.summary: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in the way MKVToolNix MKVINFO v25.0.0 handles the MKV (matroska) file format. A specially crafted MKV file can cause arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user.
